description: This pipeline generates a results table containing ROI statistics and then adds column annotations to the table as new columns. The main steps involve generating the ROI statistics, and then adding the column annotations.

e33b0212-b077-4da6-b95b-c71911d7f5f0.name: ij1-roi-statistics
e33b0212-b077-4da6-b95b-c71911d7f5f0.description:
Generates a results table containing ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, an empty reference image is automatically generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a27a7322-7bb1-4ec6-a4f1-c05b608e4248.name: table-add-annotation-columns
a27a7322-7bb1-4ec6-a4f1-c05b608e4248.description: Adds column annotations to the table as new columns.
